summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after code review fixes. All backend APIs (63/63 tests) and frontend flows passed. Verified stable key fixes in fee-related components and stale closure fixes in Dashboard/Attendance/Timetable.
passed_tests: Backend: All 63 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Login: 5 demo account buttons visible and click-to-fill works correctly
Dashboard: All KPIs, charts, recent payments, and events render correctly
Fee Collection: Student selection, fee items with checkboxes, stable keys verified (checkbox toggle works, item updates correct item)
Assign Fee Dialog: Custom items mode, stable keys verified (deleted middle item, remaining items kept correct data)
Parent Pay: Fee items with checkboxes, stable keys verified (only toggled checkbox changed state)
Attendance: Class selection, student grid, Mark All Present, individual status buttons, Save button all work
Timetable: Class selection, timetable table renders correctly
Analytics: Page loads with KPIs and sections
Reports: Both tabs (Fee Collection + Student Fee Status) load and switch correctly
Users: User table with 45 users, role filters, action buttons all present
